mapper.sql: SELECT id, project_id, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, customer_id, customer_name, fee_id, fee_name, fee_type, bill_period, begin_date, end_date, num, price, total, overdue_fee, discount_id, discount_amount, receivable, pay_state, paid_amount, pay_log_id, pay_time, gen_batch, meter_reading_id, remark, enabled_mark, creator_time, creator_user_id, last_modify_time, last_modify_user_id, delete_time, delete_user_id FROM resi_receivable
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO resi_receivable ( id, project_id, resource_type, resource_id, resource_name, customer_id, customer_name, fee_id, fee_name, fee_type, bill_period, begin_date, end_date, num, price, total, overdue_fee, discount_id, discount_amount, receivable, pay_state, paid_amount, pay_log_id, pay_time, gen_batch, meter_reading_id, remark, enabled_mark, creator_time, creator_user_id, last_modify_time, last_modify_user_id ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.resourceType}, #{item.resourceId}, #{item.resourceName}, #{item.customerId}, #{item.customerName}, #{item.feeId}, #{item.feeName}, #{item.feeType}, #{item.billPeriod}, #{item.beginDate}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.num}, #{item.price}, #{item.total}, #{item.overdueFee}, #{item.discountId}, #{item.discountAmount}, #{item.receivable}, #{item.payState}, #{item.paidAmount}, #{item.payLogId}, #{item.payTime}, #{item.genBatch}, #{item.meterReadingId}, #{item.remark}, #{item.enabledMark}, #{item.creatorTime}, #{item.creatorUserId}, #{item.lastModifyTime}, #{item.lastModifyUserId} )
